name: Volkov
bio: Leader of the Crux gang, Volkov built his organization into something considerably more disciplined than Gary's chaos ever managed to be -- fewer theatrics, more patience, a rivalry with the Ciara Locos he treated less as a street war and more as a long, cold campaign to be won on his own terms.

When Nexus's attention swung toward the Locos in the wake of the botched gunfight and Gary's bargain with Cletus, Volkov watched with the calculating satisfaction of a man who had spent years waiting for exactly this kind of opening, and began quietly positioning to take advantage of his rival's collapse.

That advantage never fully materialized. Malakar's rise made the old gang war look small by comparison, and Volkov, pragmatic above all else, found himself an uneasy ally against a threat that didn't care which colors anyone wore. He never became a friend to A-D's circle, but he stopped being their enemy when it mattered, which was, by Neo Ciara's standards, close enough.
